title: Algebraic Methods
description: Divide polynomials and use the factor and remainder theorems to factorise and solve cubic and quartic equations, then simplify algebraic fractions and split them into partial fractions.
objectives: Divide a cubic polynomial by a linear factor
Apply the factor theorem to identify linear factors of a polynomial
Apply the remainder theorem to find the remainder of a polynomial division without dividing
Factorise and solve cubic and simple quartic equations using the factor theorem
Simplify algebraic fractions by factorising and cancelling common factors
Split an algebraic fraction with distinct linear factors in the denominator into partial fractions

lessons.title: Algebraic division and the factor and remainder theorems
Factorising and solving cubic and quartic equations
Algebraic fractions and basic partial fractions
